c_r.notes: Canonical branch theorem extraction for the response constant c_r. The extraction layer preserves the native RH drift-guard value without changing gate behavior.

delta_rec.notes: Canonical restart-spacing constant on the theorem lane. Promoted deterministically into the registry consumed by the RH drift guard.

eps_coh.notes: Strict canonical coherence residual. The extraction layer enforces the exact zero condition required by the RH closure guard.

mu_strat.notes: Canonical strategy margin on the theorem lane. This explicit raw slot replaces the earlier manual-only registry entry while preserving the native RH value.

rho_nf.notes: Canonical no-failure radius extracted into the standard constant pipeline and consumed unchanged by the RH drift guard.

xi_tail.notes: Canonical tail control parameter. The extraction manifest makes the guard input explicit and auditable without changing the RH threshold test.

eta_coh_star_can.notes: Strict canonical coherence stitch constant on the theorem lane.

l_d_can.notes: Canonical tube drift constant preserved through the extraction/promote path.

sigma_star_can.notes: Canonical design reserve consumed by the manifold-constrained G_M closure mode.
